name: Q1985366
abstract: Nicholas Mathew Ceroli (December 22, 1939 – August 11, 1985) was an American jazz drummer.

concerts.label: Herb Alpert and the Tijuana Brass
Herb Alpert and the Tijuana Brass

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Frishberg
about_quotes.evidence: It was a hot band, very good musicians on it including some from the original Tijuana Brass like the drummer, Nick Ceroli and John Pisano the guitar player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Frishberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: I had him in a small band with Art Pepper and Cat Anderson and Tricky Lofton and Dave Frishberg and Nick Ceroli and Joe Mondragon and Jack Marshall.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
